scripts.test:sync-rustfs: GOCACHE=$PWD/../../.cache/go-build KUKU_TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgres://kuku:kuku@127.0.0.1:5555/kuku?sslmode=disable KUKU_TEST_RUSTFS_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:9000 KUKU_TEST_RUSTFS_BUCKET=kuku-sync-test KUKU_TEST_RUSTFS_ACCESS_KEY=rustfsadmin KUKU_TEST_RUSTFS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=rustfsadmin KUKU_TEST_RUSTFS_FORCE_PATH_STYLE=true go test ./internal/sync -run TestServiceIntegrationRustFSObjectStorageRoundTrip -count=1
